title: stemonoporus revolutus
intro: Stemonoporus revolutus, also known as the Ceylon ironwood, is a species of tree in the family Stemonuraceae. It is a medium-sized evergreen tree native to Sri Lanka, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. The bark, leaves, and roots of the Stemonoporus revolutus have been used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
